description: Represents an automatically created recovery point for an Amazon Redshift Serverless namespace. Recovery points are created every 30 minutes and kept for 24 hours.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the recovery point.
Arn.markdownDescription:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the recovery point.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

RecoveryPointId.description: The unique identifier of the recovery point.
RecoveryPointId.markdownDescription:
The unique identifier of the recovery point.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

RecoveryPointCreateTime.description: The time the recovery point was created, in ISO 8601 format.
RecoveryPointCreateTime.markdownDescription:
The time the recovery point was created, in ISO 8601 format.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

TotalSizeInMegaBytes.description: The total size of the data in the recovery point in megabytes.
TotalSizeInMegaBytes.markdownDescription:
The total size of the data in the recovery point in megabytes.

---

Required: No  
Type: Number  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

NamespaceName.description: The name of the namespace the recovery point is associated with.
NamespaceName.markdownDescription:
The name of the namespace the recovery point is associated with.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 3  
Maximum Length: 64  
Pattern: ^[a-z0-9-]+$  
Update requires: Replacement
